LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.1.label: Left track
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.10.label: Front armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.11.label: Rear armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.12.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.13.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.14.label: Steering apparatus
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.15.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.16.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.2.label: Right track
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.3.label: Front left drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.4.label: Front right drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.5.label: Back left drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.6.label: Back right drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.7.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.8.label: Left armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.components.9.label: Right armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.comps.2.verbs.0.label: pop smoke
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.description:
A tracked, armoured fighting vehicle, the Badger is designed to transport scouts and infantry while providing covering fire to suppress enemy troops. Reinforced side armour plating, ability to deploy blindsmoke and a powerful anti-infantry automated gun make it a powerful vehicle in small combat engagement. It’s relatively vulnerable to attacks from behind, and the short range of the turret means it is outclassed by most designated tanks.

Compared to previous generations, this IFV is designed to quickly drop infantry off at a desired location and provide light covering fire. Lack of armor piercing on fired projectiles make it weak against enemy tanks.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Gunner x1, Passenger x4
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.label: Badger
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.properties.roles.1.label: gunner
LanguageData.VVE_Badger.properties.roles.2.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.0.label: Engine

LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.10.label: Right middle suspension
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.11.label: Back left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.12.label: Back right suspension

LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.15.label: Right side panel

LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.17.label: Right chemtank

LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.24.label: Hood
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.25.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.3.label: Left middle wheel
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.4.label: Right middle wheel
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.5.label: Back left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.6.label: Back right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.7.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.8.label: Front right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.components.9.label: Left middle suspension
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.description:
A dedicated cargo transporter, the Big Rig is the epitome of bulk material transportation. While best suited on flat roads, it still has a powerful enough engine to effectively charge through difficult terrain.

A surprisingly quick, gas-guzzling cargo transporter that has terrible acceleration, but very little can slow it down once it gets up to speed.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.label: Big Rig
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_BigRig.properties.roles.1.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.1.label: Front left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.10.label: Middle right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.11.label: Back left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.12.label: Back right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.13.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.14.label: Left armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.15.label: Right armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.16.label: Front armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.17.label: Left chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.18.label: Right chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.19.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.2.label: Front right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.20.label: Steering wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.21.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.22.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.3.label: Middle left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.4.label: Middle right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.5.label: Back left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.6.label: Back right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.7.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.8.label: Front right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.components.9.label: Middle left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.description:
A dedicated multiple launch rocket system platform, the Burya is a long-range siege and area denial weapon that can be operated by a two-man crew for faster loading speeds. Capable of firing continuous volleys of long range missiles, Burya can blanket whole areas in anti-infantry rocket explosions.

Slow-moving and vulnerable to enemy fire, Burya needs to deploy before it can open fire, which may leave it stranded in enemy territory.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Gunner x2
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.label: Burya
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Burya.properties.roles.1.label: gunner
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.0.label: Front engine
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.1.label: Rear engine
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.10.label: Right fuel intake
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.11.label: Front transmission
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.12.label: Rear transmission
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.13.label: Left turbo shaft
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.14.label: Right turbo shaft
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.15.label: Left frontal panel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.16.label: Right frontal panel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.17.label: Left rear panel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.18.label: Right rear panel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.19.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.2.label: Front left landing wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.20.label: Front rotor mast
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.21.label: Rear rotor mast
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.22.label: Upholstery
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.23.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.24.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.25.label: Front servos
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.26.label: Rear servos
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.3.label: Front right landing wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.4.label: Rear left landing wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.5.label: Rear right landing wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.6.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.7.label: Front engine cover
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.8.label: Rear engine cover
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.components.9.label: Left fuel intake
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.description:
A heavy duty transport aircraft, the Cherokee is a hulking monstrosity of aeronautical engineering. Very slow due to all the bulk, equally thirsty, and sports massive cargo capacity. Plan accordingly.

A dedicated transport helicopter with a modified cargo bay, it requires two pilots to operate and frequent refueling. However, nothing comes even close to bulk transportation at its tech level.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x2
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.label: Cherokee
LanguageData.VVE_Cherokee.properties.roles.0.label: pilot
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.1.label: First thruster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.10.label: Hull
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.11.label: Blast shield
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.2.label: Second thruster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.3.label: Third thruster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.4.label: Fourth thruster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.5.label: First booster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.6.label: Second booster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.7.label: Third booster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.8.label: Fourth booster
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.components.9.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.description:
More of a movable mini-base than a deployment pod, Goliath is an expensive but powerful solution to any immovable enemy object. Equipped with four military turret stations and a long range rocket swarm turret at the top, this siege pod is capable of raining fire in 360 degree radius. Nearly impenetrable, it can serve as a portable base of operations, keeping all troops inside safe.

It’s incredibly heavy and lift off requires single-use boosters that separate once the trajectory and velocity is reached. In order to lift off again, the boosters need to be rebuilt.

Being a flying vehicle, it is extremely obvious when on the move.
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.label: Goliath
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.0.label: operator
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.1.label: swarm gunner
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.2.label: gunner 1
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.3.label: gunner 2
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.4.label: gunner 3
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.5.label: gunner 4
LanguageData.VVE_Goliath.properties.roles.6.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.1.label: Front left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.10.label: Left side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.11.label: Right side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.12.label: Left chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.13.label: Front bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.14.label: Rear bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.15.label: Upholstery
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.16.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.17.label: Steering wheel

LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.20.label: Roof

LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.4.label: Back right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.5.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.6.label: Front right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.7.label: Back left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.8.label: Back right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.components.9.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.comps.1.description: Enable or disable cargo refrigeration on this refrigerated truck. Refrigeration will stop items from spoiling, but will continuously use up fuel.
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.comps.1.label: Cargo refrigeration
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.description:
A dedicated refrigeration vehicle, the Hermano is a decent cargo transporter with a specific niche in ferrying perishable goods. Decent in long-range travel along roads, it performs terribly in off-road or winter conditions.

While there are better cargo transporters even in lower tiers, this truck can transport cargo in a frozen state, preventing spoilage. Due to the extra machinery, performance suffers and it should stay away from conflict zones.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.label: Hermano
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Hermano.properties.roles.1.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.1.label: Front left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.10.label: Left side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.11.label: Right side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.12.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.13.label: Front bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.14.label: Rear bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.15.label: Upholstery
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.16.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.17.label: Steering wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.18.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.19.label: Hood
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.2.label: Front right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.20.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.3.label: Back left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.4.label: Back right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.5.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.6.label: Front right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.7.label: Back left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.8.label: Back right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.components.9.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.description:
A fast general purpose transporter, the Lightning is an excellent road vehicle for getting an appreciable amount of cargo in a very small time frame. Incredibly fast on flat roads and will struggle on hills, snow or winter tiles.

As it is designed for speed, trips should always be planned for staying on roads and having extra fuel, which can occupy most of the extra cargo space. It has terrible fuel efficiency due to the performance, so plan accordingly.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.label: Lightning
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Lightning.properties.roles.1.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.0.label: Left landing skid
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.1.label: Right landing skid
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.10.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.11.label: Rotor mast
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.12.label: Upholstery
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.13.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.14.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.15.label: Servos
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.2.label: Left horizontal stabilizer
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.3.label: Right horizontal stabilizer
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.4.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.5.label: Fuel intake
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.6.label: Transmission
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.7.label: Rudder
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.8.label: Left side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.components.9.label: Right side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.description:
An armoured transport aircraft, the Louie is a robust and agile mobile mode of transportation. Doesn’t require a landing strip and won’t fall apart at the first sign of fire.

A relatively general purpose helicopter, it has both excellent cargo and passenger capacity. Has some armour for an aircraft, allowing it to deploy and extract from hot zones.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1, Passenger x5
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.label: Louie
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.properties.roles.0.label: pilot
LanguageData.VVE_Louie.properties.roles.1.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.1.label: Left track
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.10.label: Right armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.11.label: Rear armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.12.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.13.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.14.label: Steering apparatus
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.15.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.16.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.2.label: Right track
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.3.label: Front left drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.4.label: Front right drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.5.label: Back left drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.6.label: Back right drive sprocket
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.7.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.8.label: Front armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.components.9.label: Left armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.comps.2.verbs.0.label: pop smoke
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.description:
A general main battle tank, the Marshal is an improved combat vehicle that performs well in any engagement. Performs better in less favourable terrain with all sides armoured, the thinnest plating being at the rear near the engine.

Minimal armour improvements compared to previous tier tanks, instead it has a more powerful main gun and a secondary gun. Can fire while moving, as it requires one driver and two gunners; one for each weapon system.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Gunner x1, Machine gunner x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.label: Marshal
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.properties.roles.1.label: gunner
LanguageData.VVE_Marshal.properties.roles.2.label: machine gunner
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.1.label: Front left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.10.label: Left side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.11.label: Right side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.12.label: Front panel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.13.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.14.label: Front bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.15.label: Rear bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.16.label: Upholstery
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.17.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.18.label: Steering wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.19.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.2.label: Front right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.20.label: Hood
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.21.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.3.label: Back left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.4.label: Back right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.5.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.6.label: Front right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.7.label: Back left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.8.label: Back right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.components.9.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.description:
An armoured all-rounder vehicle, the Nomad performs remarkably well in all categories with an excellent cargo and passenger capacity. Performs well in any and all terrain, with some minor issues in the cold.

A relatively general purpose tier 3, effectively being a lightly armoured APC. While it excels in off road capabilities and works well in all situations, other vehicles perform even better on roads or in specialized tasks.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x3
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.label: Nomad
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Nomad.properties.roles.1.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.1.label: First left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.10.label: Second left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.11.label: Third left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.12.label: Fourth left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.13.label: First right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.14.label: Second right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.15.label: Third right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.16.label: Fourth right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.17.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.18.label: Front armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.19.label: Left armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.2.label: Second left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.20.label: Right armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.21.label: Rear armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.22.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.23.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.24.label: Steering apparatus
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.25.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.26.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.3.label: Third left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.4.label: Fourth left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.5.label: First right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.6.label: Second right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.7.label: Third right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.8.label: Fourth right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.components.9.label: First left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.description:
A general purpose armoured personnel carrier, the Paladin is a fast and hardy troop transport. Decent cargo holds, reinforced armour plating, all-terrain capability and a smoke grenade turret for screening troop deployment. The major downsides are no tracks for better terrain navigation and thinner plating on the rear.

Compared to previous generations, this APC is designed to quickly drop infantry off at a desired location and quickly retreat. It can act as temporary cover but ideally it should be able to deploy its cargo and bring it home safely.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Gunner x1, Passenger x6
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.label: Paladin
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.properties.roles.1.label: gunner
LanguageData.VVE_Paladin.properties.roles.2.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.0.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.1.label: Front left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.10.label: Left side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.11.label: Right side panel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.12.label: Chemtank
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.13.label: Front bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.14.label: Rear bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.15.label: Upholstery
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.16.label: Dashboard
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.17.label: Steering wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.18.label: Alternator
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.19.label: Hood
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.2.label: Front right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.20.label: Roof
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.3.label: Back left wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.4.label: Back right wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.5.label: Front left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.6.label: Front right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.7.label: Back left suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.8.label: Back right suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.components.9.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.description:
A general all-rounder vehicle, the Springbok performs well in all categories with a good cargo and passenger capacity. The old, robust build and loud engine negatively affect its fuel efficiency and visibility. Best suited on flat roads and will struggle somewhat on hills, snow or winter tiles.

A slightly worse performer compared to tier 2 vehicles, it is instead a stylish vehicle to drive and will provide a mood boost to all passengers.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x3
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.label: Springbok
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Springbok.properties.roles.1.label: passenger
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.components.0.label: Engine

LanguageData.VVE_Udar.components.7.label: Gearbox
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.components.8.label: Front armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.components.9.label: Left armor plating
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.description:
A dedicated artillery unit, the Udar is a long-range siege weapon that can be operated by a two-man crew for faster loading speeds. Small and inefficient fuel reserves are its limiting factor, as it can drive through any terrain without issue.

A priority target and defenseless by itself or in close range, especially with its thin rear plating, a well-defended Udar can lay down quick barrages of mortar shells and reposition out of danger.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Gunner x2
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.label: Udar
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.properties.roles.0.label: driver
LanguageData.VVE_Udar.properties.roles.1.label: gunner
